_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of network architecture concepts including topology, protocols, and components.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP, DNS resolution, HTTP/HTTPS protocols, firewall and security group configurations, load balancing, and how network architecture affects data pipeline design and performance.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-003 (DA, cosine: 0.474), DQ-K-007 (DQ, cosine: 0.473).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.8/10 (raw 0.678). Shared vocabulary: [architecture, knowledge, network, protocols]. DCWF-only terms [components, concepts, topology] vs WIDAI-only terms [affects, balancing, configurations, data, design, dns] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.904 (P=0.932, R=0.877). P exceeds R by 0.055 — the DCWF element's 10 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 31 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of network architecture concepts including topology, protocols, and co" and "Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.631 ≈ STS 0.678 (gap 0.047). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [architecture, knowledge, network, protocols] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 21.2%. Shared tokens: [architecture, knowledge, network, protocols]. DCWF-only: [components, concepts, topology]. WIDAI-only: [affects, balancing, configurations, data, design, dns].
